ssh_key_path.name: SSH key path
ssh_key_path.description: Location of the private SSH key used by Network Explorer. The key is generated and managed by the add-on and is used to connect to managed Pi-hole, OpenWrt and Linux devices.

ping_workers.name: ping_workers
ping_workers.description: The number of concurrent pings to send at once during each refresh. Higher values complete scans faster, but briefly use more CPU and network bandwidth. Default: 50.

ping_timeout.name: ping_timeout
ping_timeout.description: The time in seconds to wait for each ping response before treating that ping as failed. Default: 1.

tcp_probe.name: tcp_probe
tcp_probe.description: Also checks common TCP ports when a device does not respond to ping. This can detect devices that block ICMP ping but still have services open, such as SSH, HTTP, HTTPS or DNS. It may make refreshes slightly slower.

tcp_ports.name: tcp_ports
tcp_ports.description: TCP ports to test when tcp_probe is enabled. Common examples are 22 for SSH, 53 for DNS, 80 for HTTP and 443 for HTTPS.
